tools.name: slack_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: channels_list
tools.description: List channels, DMs, and Group DMs.

tools.name: conversations_history
tools.description: Get messages in a channel or DM.

tools.name: conversations_add_message
tools.description: Post a message to a channel or thread.

tools.name: email_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: list_emails
tools.description: List emails in a folder with pagination support.

tools.name: get_email_by_id
tools.description: Get an email by its unique ID.

tools.name: get_email_by_index
tools.description: Get an email by its index position in a folder.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email to the specified recipients.

tools.name: forward_email
tools.description: Forward an existing email to new recipients.

tools.name: move_email
tools.description: Move an email from one folder to another.

tools.name: delete_email
tools.description: Delete an email by moving it to the TRASH folder.

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search for emails in a folder based on a query string.

tools.name: show_data
tools.description: Show raw email data as JSON.

tools.name: list_jmap_emails
tools.description: List emails in RFC8621 JMAP format.

tools.name: get_jmap_email
tools.description: Get single email in RFC8621 JMAP format.

tools.name: list_mailboxes
tools.description: Get all mailboxes with counts and metadata.

tools.name: get_mailbox
tools.description: Get mailbox by ID with current counts.

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Get conversation thread with all related emails.

tools.name: get_email_threads
tools.description: List threads in a specific mailbox.

tools.name: linear_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: linear_create_comment
tools.description: Create a comment on an issue.

tools.name: contacts_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: contacts_get_contact
tools.description: Get a specific contact by ID.

tools.name: contacts_search_contacts
tools.description: Search contacts by name, phone, or email.

tools.name: calendar_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: calendar_get_calendar_event
tools.description: Get a calendar event by ID.

tools.name: calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to
tools.description: Get events that overlap with a date range.

tools.name: calendar_search_events
tools.description: Search events by query in title, description, location, and attendees.

tools.name: airtable_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: airtable_list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in a specific base.

tools.name: airtable_describe_table
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific table.

tools.name: airtable_create_table
tools.description: Create a new table in a base.

tools.name: airtable_update_table
tools.description: Update a table's schema (name and/or description).

tools.name: airtable_create_field
tools.description: Create a new field in a table.

tools.name: airtable_update_field
tools.description: Update a field in a table. Field type cannot be changed.

tools.name: airtable_list_records
tools.description: List records from a specified Airtable table.

tools.name: airtable_get_record
tools.description: Get a specific record by ID.

tools.name: airtable_create_record
tools.description: Create a new record in a table.

tools.name: airtable_update_records
tools.description: Update one or more records in a table (max 10 per call).

tools.name: airtable_delete_records
tools.description: Delete one or more records from a table.

tools.name: airtable_search_records
tools.description: Search for records containing specific value in a field.

tools.name: airtable_show_data
tools.description: Show raw data as JSON for debugging.

tools.name: crm_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: crm_search_deals
tools.description: Search deals by name and/or company ID.

tools.name: crm_update_deal_stage
tools.description: Update the stage of a deal.

tools.name: crm_search_leads
tools.description: Search leads by name and/or company ID.

tools.name: crm_list_engagements
tools.description: List engagements, optionally filtered by contact or company IDs.

tools.name: quickbooks_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: quickbooks_create_customer
tools.description: Create a new customer in QuickBooks.

tools.name: quickbooks_search_customers
tools.description: Search for customers using flexible criteria.

tools.name: quickbooks_create_vendor
tools.description: Create a new vendor in QuickBooks.

tools.name: quickbooks_search_vendors
tools.description: Search for vendors using flexible criteria.

tools.name: quickbooks_create_account
tools.description: Create a new account in the Chart of Accounts.

tools.name: quickbooks_search_accounts
tools.description: Search for accounts using flexible criteria.

tools.name: quickbooks_create_invoice
tools.description: Create a new invoice with line items.

tools.name: quickbooks_search_bills
tools.description: Search for bills using flexible criteria.
